name: Indonesian Glazed Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1) Remove the tips from the chicken wings and cut them at the joint.
2) Microwave the honey for 30 to 45 seconds on high to soften. Mix the softened honey with soy sauce, garlic, and ginger.
3) Place the chicken in a large, shallow pan and pour over the sauce mixture. Ensure it covers the chicken by about 1/4". Add water or stock if more liquid is needed. Cover the pan tightly with aluminum foil.
4) Bake the chicken for three hours at 325 degrees Fahrenheit. Uncover the pan and increase the oven temperature to 375 degrees Fahrenheit. Bake for 45 minutes, turning the chicken once or twice. The chicken should be a rich, dark brown and the sauce reduced by two-thirds. Serve immediately.
TO PREPARE THE DISH AHEAD: Bake for three hours then cool and refrigerate. Return to the preheated oven at 375 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for one hour.
